subject: Items to confirm at tomorrow's pilot prep meeting
body:
Hi,

For tomorrow afternoon's pilot prep meeting, we would like to confirm three things:
1. Can you provide SOC 2 related materials and a more detailed data compliance statement?
2. If we launch the pilot in early April, can the implementation timeline be reviewed during the meeting?
3. Can the HIS integration start with read-only access first?

Both our CTO Tao Wang and I will attend. We hope you can also prepare some recommendations.

Thanks,
Jing Li
StarCare Health

subject: Re: Background notes for tomorrow's StarCare Health meeting
body:
A few background points to prepare before the meeting:

- Their procurement team has already asked once for the security materials checklist. If we don't have SOC 2 or an equivalent document, progress will slow down.
- CTO Tao Wang cares a lot about the HIS API boundaries — prefers read-only access first and doesn't want write-back involved at the start.
- They want to run a test with de-identified sample data first and only move to real data after confirming the workflow runs smoothly.
- If we can clearly present the 4-week pilot plan during the meeting, Jing Li will find it easier to push through internal approvals.

Ning Zhou

subject: Office HVAC maintenance notice
body: HVAC maintenance will take place after 8 PM tonight. Please leave the office area in advance.
